name: Sage Lilac
concept: A soft habit ritual that makes one small win feel ceremonial.

componentsLibrary.label: Action button
componentsLibrary.description: Command buttons, icon actions, and destructive variants.

componentsLibrary.label: Activity list item
componentsLibrary.description: Single activity-history row with metadata and edit/delete actions.

componentsLibrary.label: App brand
componentsLibrary.description: Compact and large HealthQuest identity lockups.

componentsLibrary.label: App top bar
componentsLibrary.description: Responsive shell toolbar with brand, status chip, and notification action.

componentsLibrary.label: Empty state
componentsLibrary.description: Centered empty state with one clear recovery action.

componentsLibrary.label: Goal card
componentsLibrary.description: Reusable card for a goal summary, streaks, progress, and reward.

componentsLibrary.label: Health text field
componentsLibrary.description: Labeled text, numeric, select, helper, and error field states.

componentsLibrary.label: Metric card
componentsLibrary.description: Small dashboard summary tiles with semantic tone.

componentsLibrary.label: Navigation bar
componentsLibrary.description: Primary navigation item states used for bottom, rail, tab, and drawer modes.

componentsLibrary.label: Page header
componentsLibrary.description: Page title block with eyebrow, description, and primary action.

componentsLibrary.label: Reward card
componentsLibrary.description: Reward state card with status, milestone progress, and earned treatment.

componentsLibrary.label: Section header
componentsLibrary.description: Section title row with supporting note or inline action.

componentsLibrary.label: Segmented filter
componentsLibrary.description: Compact mode, status, cadence, and time-window selector.

componentsLibrary.label: Status banner
componentsLibrary.description: Offline, success, and error status messages.

componentsLibrary.label: Streak summary
componentsLibrary.description: Current and longest streak summaries for list and detail views.

componentsLibrary.label: Week strip
componentsLibrary.description: Seven-day progress strip for cadence windows.

domainLibrary.label: Onboarding component
domainLibrary.description: First-run habit ritual and entry CTA.

domainLibrary.label: Sign-in component
domainLibrary.description: Username/password sign-in with SSO fallback and error state.

domainLibrary.label: Create account component
domainLibrary.description: Registration candidate for backend-owned user management.

domainLibrary.label: Reset password component
domainLibrary.description: Password reset request and neutral success message.

domainLibrary.label: Auth session states component
domainLibrary.description: Callback, signed-out, and expired-token states.

domainLibrary.label: Dashboard overview component
domainLibrary.description: Authenticated home overview with next action, metrics, goals, rewards, and chart.

domainLibrary.label: Goal list component
domainLibrary.description: Searchable and filterable goal collection view.

domainLibrary.label: Goal empty component
domainLibrary.description: No-goals state for first run or all goals deleted.

domainLibrary.label: Goal detail component
domainLibrary.description: Single-goal detail with target, streaks, reward, and activity history.

domainLibrary.label: Goal form component
domainLibrary.description: Create/edit goal form with cadence and custom interval controls.

domainLibrary.label: Delete goal dialog component
domainLibrary.description: Explicit destructive confirmation for goal deletion.

domainLibrary.label: Log activity sheet component
domainLibrary.description: Mobile bottom-sheet activity logging interaction.

domainLibrary.label: Log activity dialog component
domainLibrary.description: Desktop activity logging dialog.

domainLibrary.label: Edit activity dialog component
domainLibrary.description: Activity edit dialog that recomputes streaks after save.

domainLibrary.label: Delete activity dialog component
domainLibrary.description: Activity deletion confirmation.

domainLibrary.label: Discard changes dialog component
domainLibrary.description: Unsaved draft confirmation for activity logging.

domainLibrary.label: Reward list component
domainLibrary.description: Reward collection, claim hero, grouped statuses, and earned notification.

domainLibrary.label: Reward form component
domainLibrary.description: Create/edit reward form with goal target or streak milestone condition.

domainLibrary.label: Stats component
domainLibrary.description: Activity chart and aggregate progress summaries.
